privileged.title: Privileged
privileged.description: Full access to all resources, approval rights, and system settings.

department_heads.title: Department Heads
department_heads.description: Write access scoped to their department. Can create and manage controls.

employees.title: Employees
employees.description: Control owners with limited access. Changes require approval.
